prestazioni: Engine: FA24F (2.4L turbocharged boxer-4, direct injection) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings to handle 30+ psi boost targets while maintaining 11.5:1 compression ratio for E85 compatibility.

Turbocharger: Garrett GTX3582R Gen II with billet compressor wheel (76mm inducer, 82mm exducer) and 0.82 A/R turbine housing, paired with a Tomei 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and custom 3-inch titanium exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power SPEC-L.

ECU & Fueling: Cobb Accessport v3 with custom ProTune Stage 3+ map (optimized for E85 flex-fuel with ethanol content sensor), upgraded fuel system featuring Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup, ID1050x injectors, and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump with Aeromotive FPR for 1,200+ hp capability.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Forester-specific, 30mm extended fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and rear diffuser) with custom STI-spec canards and a Seibon carbon fiber hood featuring a 3-inch cowl scoop for intercooler ducting.

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Forester-specific valving, 20-way adjustable compression/rebound, and 30mm adjustable ride height) paired with Cusco front strut tower bar and rear subframe brace for chassis rigidity, plus Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm) to eliminate body roll.

Wheels & Brakes: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2-piece forged wheels (19x10.5 +35 front, 19x11 +40 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear), with Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (380mm rotors) and 4-piston rear calipers (355mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads for track use.
